name: Clinton Lake Front Park
description: Clinton Lake Front Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clinton, TN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Norris Pickleball
description: Norris Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Norris, TN. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms. The court is free.

name: Oak Ridge Broadway Tennis Courts
description: Oak Ridge Broadway Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oak Ridge, TN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Oak Ridge High School Tennis Courts
description: Oak Ridge High School Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oak Ridge, TN. There are 6 outdoor wood courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
